name: GPU, MPI, And Performance
summary: Skills for validating GPU allocations, GPU binding, GPU memory failures, TensorBoard training monitors, Ray, JAX, Hugging Face Accelerate, TensorFlow multi-worker training, NCCL communication, DeepSpeed and PyTorch DDP launches, MPI fabric evidence, MPI rank binding, hybrid MPI/OpenMP layouts, parallel HDF5/NetCDF preflight, Darshan I/O profile analysis, Lustre striping layout planning, containerized MPI, and mpi4py launches, OpenMP placement, Slurm efficiency review, storage smoke benchmarks, and first-pass performance evidence.
